description_long: This object is a cubic wooden storage box with a visibly textured surface that mimics the appearance of natural wood grain. The box features a slightly recessed top and side panels, with vertical and horizontal wood grain lines and subtle knots, giving it a rustic and sturdy look. The coloration is a deep, rich brown, suggesting it is either stained or made from a dark wood species. There are no visible handles, locks, or hinges, and the box appears to be a solid, closed container. The surface is matte with a rough, tactile finish, indicating it is likely unfinished or only lightly treated. This type of box is commonly used for storage or transport in garages, warehouses, or outdoor urban environments.
description: A cubic, dark brown wooden storage box with a rough, natural wood grain texture and no visible handles or locks. The surface is matte and rustic, suitable for storage in garages or outdoor urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the detailed wood grain texture and recessed paneling on the face of the box.
description_view_1: Side view nearly identical to the front, with similar wood grain and recessed paneling visible.
description_view_2: Another side view, matching the previous views with consistent wood grain and paneling.
description_view_3: Rear view, visually indistinguishable from the other sides, maintaining the same wood texture and panel design.
